content: LGPD user self-delete Supabase: Cannot use auth.admin.deleteUser() from client — requires service_role key (server only). Correct pattern: Postgres function with SECURITY DEFINER that deletes from auth.users where id = auth.uid(). Create function: CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION delete_user() RETURNS void LANGUAGE sql SECURITY DEFINER AS $$ delete from auth.users where id = auth.uid(); $$; Then call via supabase.rpc('delete_user'). After RPC: clear local session manually (localStorage), redirect to welcome. Known issue: subsequent signOut() may fail with 500 — handle gracefully by catching error and redirecting anyway.
